purpose: Run only after exploratory checkpoint selection is frozen; never launched automatically.
selection_rule: Choose one A0 and one A1 checkpoint using the existing 20-episode exploratory evaluation, then freeze labels before confirmation.

protocol.success_definition: preserve evaluator formal definition; all three oranges in plate at final step; no robot-rest requirement

levels.level_1: isolated B1/B2/B3, explicitly marking oracle initialization
levels.level_2: full sequential A1 fixed-time scheduler and A0

statistics.primary: paired exact McNemar on final success
statistics.secondary: paired bootstrap on final orange count and stage outcomes
